parameters.name: data
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ event_name: 'Purchase', event_time: $json.event_time, event_id: $json.event_id, action_source: 'other', user_data: { ph: [$json.phone_hash], ...$json.email_hash && { em: [$json.email_hash] }, ...$json.fn_hash && { fn: [$json.fn_hash] } }, custom_data: { value: $json.value, currency: $json.currency, content_name: $json.content_name } }]) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, events_received: $json.events_received, event_id: $('Prepara Dados CAPI').first().json.event_id } }}
